summary: Frontend testing completed for Evolution PRO Partner UX restructuring. All 13 features tested and working correctly. The new guided step-based Partner view with simplified sidebar (4 items), Home orchestrator dashboard, StepPageWrapper, and MioSpazioPage are all functioning as expected.

minor.issue: Some 404 errors in console for resource loading, but not affecting functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner UX restructuring complete. Partner view accessed via 'Vista Partner' button in admin dashboard. Demo partner Marco Ferretti is at phase F3 (Masterclass). Sidebar shows 4 items: Home, Il Mio Spazio, Supporto Team, Risultati. Admin can toggle between Admin/Partner views via sidebar toggle.

features_tested.Partner sidebar shows exactly 4 navigati: PASS - Home, Il Mio Spazio, Supporto Team, Risultati visible
features_tested.Home Dashboard shows Hero section with ': PASS - Hero section displays 'SEI QUI' and 'Masterclass' title
features_tested.Home Dashboard shows CTA section with 'C: PASS - CTA section with 'Vai ora' button visible
features_tested.Home Dashboard shows progress section wi: PASS - All 5 steps displayed with correct status indicators
features_tested.Clicking 'Vai ora' button navigates to c: PASS - Navigates to Masterclass step page
features_tested.Step pages show StepPageWrapper header: PASS - Header shows back button, step number, title, 'In corso' status
features_tested.Clicking back-to-home button returns to: PASS - Returns to Home with hero section visible
features_tested.Il Mio Spazio page shows tabs for Profil: PASS - Both tabs visible and functional
features_tested.Risultati shows locked modal for non-lau: PASS - Admin can access (by design), navigates to Ottimizzazione
features_tested.Locked steps in progress section are not: PASS - Clicking locked step (Videocorso) does not navigate
features_tested.Admin can switch between Admin and Partn: PASS - Toggle in sidebar works correctly
features_tested.Admin Partner view shows same simplified: PASS - Same 4 items visible in admin partner view
